Problems:
Current challenges:

  • No single source of truth for product strategy
  • Stakeholder alignment takes too long
  • Roadmap changes cause confusion
Solution Ideas:
• Visual canvas with real-time collaboration
  • Automated stakeholder notifications
  • Version history with diff view
Solutions Today:
Workarounds teams currently use:

  • Spreadsheets and documents
  • Whiteboard photos
  • Manual status emails
User Value:
• Faster alignment (hours vs days)
  • Clear visibility into strategy
  • Reduced meeting overhead
Adoption Strategy:
• Free tier for small teams
  • Self-serve onboarding
  • Integration with existing tools (Jira, Slack)
User Metrics:
• Canvas creation rate
  • Weekly active users
  • Time to first stakeholder share
Business Problem: Product teams struggle to maintain strategic alignment as they scale, leading to wasted development effort and missed opportunities.
